---
title: "Exercise 4.2 — Verify Norm Inequalities Numerically"
subtitle: "Numerical Analysis 2026 — Lecture 4"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-tools: true
    highlight-style: github
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
jupyter: python3
---

## Problem

Confirm the following norm inequalities numerically using random vectors:

$$
\|x\|_2 \leq \|x\|_1 \leq \sqrt{n}\,\|x\|_2,
\tag{5}
$$

$$
\|x\|_\infty \leq \|x\|_1 \leq n\,\|x\|_\infty,
\tag{6}
$$

$$
\|x\|_\infty \leq \|x\|_2 \leq \sqrt{n}\,\|x\|_\infty.
\tag{7}
$$

Use random vectors in several dimensions, for example
`n = 2, 5, 10, 50`.

---

## 1. Verification function

Complete the function below.

```{python}
import numpy as np
from numpy import linalg as LA

def verify_norm_inequalities(n_dims, n_tests=100, seed=2026):
    """
    Verify inequalities (5), (6), and (7) for random vectors.

    Parameters
    ----------
    n_dims : int
        Dimension of the random vectors.
    n_tests : int
        Number of random vectors to test.
    seed : int
        Random seed for reproducibility.

    Returns
    -------
    bool
        True if all tests pass, False otherwise.
    """
    rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)

    # TODO:
    # 1. Generate n_tests random vectors x in R^n.
    # 2. Compute ||x||_1, ||x||_2, and ||x||_inf.
    # 3. Check inequalities (5), (6), and (7).
    # 4. Return True only if all tests pass.

    pass
```

---

## 2. Run experiments

Run your function for several dimensions and report the result.

```{python}
# TODO: run your verification for several dimensions.
# Example:
# for n in [2, 5, 10, 50]:
#     ok = verify_norm_inequalities(n_dims=n, n_tests=1000)
#     print(n, ok)
```

---

## 3. Explanation

Explain what your numerical experiment confirms.

> **Your answer:**
>
> *(write here)*

Also explain why a numerical experiment is useful even though it is not a
mathematical proof.

> **Your answer:**
>
> *(write here)*
